pattern: If + 過去式, 主詞 + would + 原形
zh: 假設語氣:與現在事實相反
ex: If I were you, I would study harder.
exZh: 如果我是你,我會更用功。
q: If I ___ you, I would take the job.
note: 與現在相反,be 動詞一律用 were。

zh: 用 who 連接、代替「人」
ex: The teacher who helped me is kind.
exZh: 幫助我的那位老師人很好。
q: The man ___ called you is my uncle.
note: 先行詞是人、且在子句中當主詞,用 who。

zh: 最好(做某事),帶勸告語氣
ex: You had better see a doctor.
note: had better 後面直接接原形動詞。

ex: She is not only smart but also kind.
q: He speaks not only English ___ also Japanese.
note: 固定搭配 but also,前後詞性要對稱。

pattern: 被動語態 be + 過去分詞
ex: The meal was prepared by the chef.

note: avoid 後面接動名詞,不接不定詞。
